metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Tyler Ho

plugins.name: specflow
plugins.description: Spec-driven development workflow: scout codebase, research docs, plan tasks, and execute

plugins.name: langsmith-debug
plugins.description: Debug and analyze LangChain agents using LangSmith traces via CLI export and Python analysis scripts

plugins.name: external-agent-orchestration
plugins.description: Orchestrate external CLI coding agents (Qwen Code, Gemini CLI, OpenCode CLI) for parallel execution, diverse perspectives, and distributed LLM quota usage

plugins.name: adversarial-code-review
plugins.description: Two-agent adversarial code review with a Sonnet critiquer that debates design decisions, finds logical flaws, and negotiates net actions before any code changes
